# llms-full.txt template

> Optional machine-readable long-form site summary for agents or internal retrieval workflows.
> Do not treat this as a Google Search ranking or Google AI Overview requirement.
> Keep this file consistent with public, crawlable HTML.

# [SITE_OR_PRODUCT_NAME]

Base URL: https://[DOMAIN]
Last updated: [YYYY-MM-DD]

## Product / organization summary

[Short, factual summary of the organization, product, audience, and use cases.]

## Canonical pages

- Homepage: https://[DOMAIN]/
- Pricing: https://[DOMAIN]/pricing
- Docs: https://[DOMAIN]/docs
- Comparisons: https://[DOMAIN]/compare
- Contact: https://[DOMAIN]/contact

## Product facts

| Fact | Value | Source page | Last verified |
|---|---|---|---|
| Category | | | |
| Pricing model | | | |
| Primary audience | | | |
| Integrations | | | |

## Important content index

### Category / BOFU pages

- [Page title](https://[DOMAIN]/[PATH]) — one sentence summary.

### Docs / support

- [Page title](https://[DOMAIN]/docs/[PATH]) — one sentence summary.

### Research / data

- [Report title](https://[DOMAIN]/research/[PATH]) — methodology and date.

## Usage notes

- Respect robots.txt and page-level access controls.
- Do not use stale facts without checking the canonical source page.
- Do not infer unsupported claims from this summary.
